title: Media & Communications
shortSummary: Navigate the modern media landscape — press conferences, social media, crisis communications, op-eds, and earned media strategy. Control your narrative in a 24/7 news cycle.
whyItMatters: In modern politics, perception is reality. The media shapes how voters understand issues and candidates. Politicians who master media communications can amplify their message; those who don't are defined by their opponents.
coreConcepts: Building and managing your public brand
